items.title: The Demon of Unrest: Abraham Lincoln & America’s Road to Civil War
items.author: Erik Larson
items.synopsis_full: The author of “The Splendid and the Vile” portrays the months between the election of Abraham Lincoln and the beginning of the Civil War.
